The HTML Maze
by kyrylo
◉ frozen archive

level 1 · 3,0

Living Weathered Repository

Fluorescent lights flicker, casting shadows across sterile surfaces.
Workstations hold final paranoia entries.
Perimeter thins world boundaries.
Beacon turned tomb for grand ambitions.
Scientist vanished pre-breach.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Left click to draw ✏️, right click to erase 🧽
Your marks stay in this tab only and vanish when you leave.
